"🚨 Muslim woman stabbed in Anti-Muslim Attack in Russia

In Saratov, Russia, 17-year-old pro-Zionist Russian student, Daniil Matasov, carried out a knife attack on a Muslim woman wearing a Hijab. He followed the Muslim woman and launched his attack from behind. He tried to kill her by stabbing and then fled the scene. 

“The Muslims are about to be finished. Maybe I'll send you some photos of their bodies.”

After the attack, Matasov boasted about his attack on social media and openly declared his actions were motivated by hatred towards Muslims and the fact that the woman was wearing a Hijab .

The authorities aren’t treating this incident as a terrorist act. The suspect has been arrested and charged with attempted murder."
